text: A patient presents with the ECG tracing shown in the image. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis?
options:
A) Atrial fibrillation
B) Ventricular tachycardia
C) Second-degree AV block (Mobitz Type I)
D) Normal sinus rhythm
subject: Clinical Medicine

text: Based on the circuit diagram shown, what is the total resistance between terminals A and B?
options:
A) 10 ohms
B) 15 ohms
C) 20 ohms
D) 25 ohms
subject: Electrical Engineering

text: The bar chart shows GDP growth rates for five countries over the past decade. Which country experienced the largest decline between 2018 and 2020?
options:
A) Country A
B) Country B
C) Country C
D) Country D
subject: Economics

text: Examine the microscopy image of the tissue sample. Which cell type is indicated by the arrow?
options:
A) Neutrophil
B) Macrophage
C) Lymphocyte
D) Eosinophil
subject: Biology

text: The phase diagram shown represents a binary alloy system. At point X (marked on the diagram), what phases are present?
options:
A) Liquid only
B) Liquid + Alpha
C) Alpha + Beta
D) Beta only
subject: Materials Science

text: Consider the architectural floor plan shown. What is the approximate total square footage of the living area (excluding the garage)?
options:
A) 1,200 sq ft
B) 1,500 sq ft
C) 1,800 sq ft
D) 2,100 sq ft
subject: Architecture

text: The painting shown is an example of which art movement?
options:
A) Impressionism
B) Cubism
C) Surrealism
D) Abstract Expressionism
subject: Art History

text: Given the scatter plot with regression line shown, what is the approximate correlation coefficient (r) between the two variables?
subject: Statistics

text: The molecular structure shown represents which organic compound?
options:
A) Benzene
B) Cyclohexane
C) Toluene
D) Naphthalene
subject: Chemistry

text: Examine the topographic map shown. What is the elevation change along the trail marked in red from point P to point Q?
options:
A) 200 meters
B) 350 meters
C) 500 meters
D) 650 meters
subject: Geography
